agreement.subtitle: To take part in this study, please read and agree to the following:
agreement.checkboxLabel: I have read and agree to the above terms

screening.title: Screening Questions
screening.subtitle: Please answer the following questions to see if you qualify for this study.

questions.preStudySubtitle: Please answer a few questions to help us understand your background.
questions.postStudySubtitle: Please answer a few final questions about your experience.
questions.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

thankYou.title: Thank You!
thankYou.defaultMessage: Thank you for participating in this study. Your response has been recorded.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.defaultMessage: We encountered an error. Please try again.
error.studyNotFoundMessage: The study you're looking for doesn't exist or has been closed.
error.studyTypeNotSupported: This study type is not supported.

submitting.title: Submitting...
submitting.message: Please wait while we save your response.

password.title: Password Required
password.subtitle: This study is password protected. Please enter the password to continue.

duplicate.title: Response Already Submitted
duplicate.message: You've already completed this study. Multiple responses are not allowed.

recording.consentDescription: This study includes session recording to help researchers understand how participants {activity}.
recording.microphoneDescription: Record your voice as you complete tasks (think-aloud protocol)
recording.webcamDescription: Record video of you during the session
recording.mobileNote: Note: Screen recording requires a desktop browser. Mobile users will record audio only.

cardSort.allDone: All done! Click "{buttonText}" when you're ready.
cardSort.deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category? All cards will be moved back.
cardSort.pleaseNameCategories: Please name all your categories before submitting.
cardSort.pleaseSortAllCards: Please sort all cards into categories before submitting.

treeTest.instruction: Click folders to expand/collapse. Select the item where you'd find what you need.
treeTest.skipTaskConfirm: Are you sure you want to skip this task?

prototypeTest.skipTaskMessage: Are you sure you want to skip this task and move to the next one?

firstClick.clickOnImage: Click on the area where you would complete this task
